Title: Create a React pilot “Hello World” page for TourMate

1. Start in folder: `d:\TourMate\frontend` (or workspace root + `/frontend`).
2. Scaffold app: `npx create-react-app .` (with Node.js installed).
3. Requirements:
   - Display headline: “Welcome to TourMate”.
   - Display short description of TourMate.
   - Responsive navbar links: Features, Demo, Contact.
   - Simple, clean, mobile-first design.
4. Component structure guide:
   - `App.js`
   - `components/Navbar.js`
   - `components/Home.js`
   - `App.css`, `components/Navbar.css` (or CSS modules).
5. Provide step-by-step beginner commands:
   - Install Node.js (include official download link).
   - Use npm or yarn to manage dependencies.
   - Run dev server: `npm start` or `yarn start`.
6. Include minimal working code snippets for JSX + CSS.
7. Mention that completed app is at `http://localhost:3000` after `npm start`.
8. Keep instructions concise, clear, and executable by system automation.
